task_goal: Drive Xiaohongshu note-detail reads from Core-persisted Harbor-minted opaque search refs and record bounded result/evidence facts.
ownership_constraints: No App, Harbor, or Lode edits
No BOSS production page or admission restore
No raw URL, note id, xsec, Cookie, token, profile, DOM, HAR, network body, or screenshot bytes

delegations.task_goal: Implement and review durable opaque detail-target lifecycle and integration failure semantics.
delegations.validation_expectation: Targeted typecheck/test, full repository checks, and independent semantic review.
delegations.output_format: Modified file list, validation results, API migration notes, and severity-ordered review findings.
delegations.integration_target: CORE-270 product head and item-specific build/review carriers
delegations.result: Store implementation integrated; repeated review findings were fixed and final review returned ALLOW.

integration_evidence.summary: Atomic publication, opaque-ref binding, reservation lifecycle, persistence failure cleanup, and zero-dispatch rejection paths are integrated.
